dispute.example: They had a dispute over the bill.
dispute.example_zh: 他們為了帳單起了爭執。

distinct.example: Each flower has a distinct smell.
distinct.example_zh: 每種花都有獨特的香味。

distinguish.example: It is hard to distinguish the twins.

distribute.example: They distributed food to the poor.
distribute.example_zh: 他們把食物分發給窮人。

distribution.example: The distribution of the books was fair.

district.example: She lives in a quiet district of the city.
district.example_zh: 她住在城裡一個安靜的地區。

disturb.example: Please don't disturb the sleeping baby.

diverse.example: The city has a diverse population.

diversity.example: We celebrate the diversity of cultures.
diversity.example_zh: 我們頌揚文化的多樣性。

divine.example: People believed the king had divine power.
divine.example_zh: 人們相信國王擁有神的力量。

divorce.example: After the divorce, the children lived with their mother.
divorce.example_zh: 離婚後孩子們和母親同住。

divorce.example: She divorced her husband last year.

dodge.example: He dodged the ball just in time.

dominant.example: The dominant lion led the group.
dominant.example_zh: 居主導地位的獅子帶領著族群。

dominate.example: One team dominated the whole game.
dominate.example_zh: 一支隊伍主宰了整場比賽。

draft.example: She wrote a first draft of her essay.
He drafted a letter to the company.
draft.example_zh: 他草擬了一封給公司的信。

dread.example: I dread going to the dentist.
She felt a sense of dread.

drift.example: The empty boat drifted out to sea.
There was a slow drift of people toward the door.

drill.example: We had a fire drill at school today.
drill.example_zh: 我們學校今天舉行了消防演習。

drill.example: He used a drill to make a hole.

drowsy.example: The warm room made me feel drowsy.
drowsy.example_zh: 溫暖的房間讓我昏昏欲睡。

durable.example: These boots are strong and durable.
durable.example_zh: 這雙靴子既堅固又耐用。

dye.example: They used natural dye for the cloth.

dynamic.example: She is a dynamic and energetic leader.
dynamic.example_zh: 她是個充滿活力的領導者。

dynasty.example: The dynasty ruled for three hundred years.
dynasty.example_zh: 這個王朝統治了三百年。

earnest.example: He made an earnest effort to improve.

earphone.example: She listened to music with earphones.

economic.example_zh: 這個國家面臨經濟問題。

economical.example: This small car is very economical.

economist.example_zh: 經濟學家預測物價會上漲。

economy.example_zh: 這個國家的經濟正在成長。

economy.example: We must practice economy with water.

efficiency.example: The new system improved our efficiency.
efficiency.example_zh: 新系統提升了我們的效率。

elastic.example: The shorts have an elastic waist.
She tied her hair with a piece of elastic.
elastic.example_zh: 她用一條鬆緊帶綁頭髮。

electronics.example: The store sells phones and other electronics.
electronics.example_zh: 這家店賣手機和其他電子產品。

elegant.example: She wore an elegant black dress.
elegant.example_zh: 她穿著一件優雅的黑色洋裝。

elementary.example: My sister is in elementary school.

eliminate.example_zh: 我們必須消除粗心的錯誤。

elsewhere.example: If you can't find it here, look elsewhere.
elsewhere.example_zh: 如果這裡找不到，就到別處找。

embarrass.example: Don't embarrass me in front of my friends.
embarrass.example_zh: 別在我朋友面前讓我難堪。

embassy.example: She applied for a visa at the embassy.

emerge.example: The sun emerged from behind the clouds.

emphasis.example: The teacher put emphasis on practice.

empire.example: The Roman empire was very powerful.

enclose.example: A high wall encloses the garden.
Please enclose a photo with your form.
enclose.example_zh: 請在表格中附上一張照片。

encounter.example: We encountered a problem on the way.
encounter.example_zh: 我們途中遇到一個問題。

endure.example: They had to endure the cold winter.
endure.example_zh: 他們得忍受寒冷的冬天。

enforce.example: The police enforce the traffic rules.

enlarge.example_zh: 你可以把這張照片放大嗎？

enormous.example: The whale is an enormous animal.

ensure.example: Please ensure the door is locked.

enthusiasm.example: She showed great enthusiasm for the project.
enthusiasm.example_zh: 她對這個專案展現出極大的熱情。

equality.example: They fought for equality and justice.
equality.example_zh: 他們為平等與正義而奮鬥。

equip.example: The room is equipped with a computer.
equip.example_zh: 這個房間配有一台電腦。

era.example: We live in the era of the internet.

essential.example: Bring only the essentials for the trip.

establish.example: They established a new school in the town.
establish.example_zh: 他們在鎮上創立了一所新學校。
